description: Drive a WLED LED strip from video content playing in Jellyfin
name: WLED TV
overview: Samples pixel colours along the edges of the playing video and sends them to a WLED controller in real time, creating an immersive edge-lighting effect that reacts to the content on screen.

versions.changelog:
Fix: LEDs silent on WebOS/hardware-overlay platforms.

New setting: Video capture method. Select WebGL if the LEDs do not turn on during playback (hardware overlay issue on WebOS/smart TV platforms).
New setting: Send debug logs to mock WLED server (keeps mock log clean by default).
Add plugin icon (shown in Jellyfin's plugin catalogue).

First stable release.

Full-featured WLED edge-lighting plugin for Jellyfin:
- Direct browser → WLED WebSocket connection
- Auto-detects letterbox/pillarbox bars; samples only the actual picture area
- Per-device restriction: limit edge lighting to one specific Jellyfin client
- Inline connection test against the live URL input value
- Clockwise/counter-clockwise strip direction, configurable start position
- Adjustable brightness, sample depth, and update rate
